title: Punjabi Bhain
gloss: The Punjabi Sister, Volume 3, No. 12, for April, 1910. A monthly magazine devoted to the interests of female education.
publisher: Edited and published by B. Takht Singh, Sikh Kanniya Maha Vidyalya
notes: Punjabi Bhain ('The Punjabi Sister') — Bhai Takht Singh's landmark women's-education monthly from the Sikh Kanya Mahavidyala; 1,800 copies.

title: Anwar-ush-Shams
gloss: A law periodical giving the translation of all the civil and criminial judgments of the Chief Court, Punjab, and also of the revenue cases decided by the Financial Commissioner, Punjab, Digest of Indian Law Reports, etc., Volume XLV, No. 5, for May, 1910. Edited by Babu Jai Gopal.
notes: Urdu translation of Chief Court judgments — colonial law rendered into the vernacular monthly.

title: Anwar-ush-Shams, Volume XLV No. 6, for June, 1910
Index. Index to Volume XLIV of the Punjab Record for 1909
gloss: Edited by Mr. Ganpat Rai, Barrister at-Law, Lahore.
price: Annual subscription, Rs. 8, annas 4; single copy, 12 annas
copyright: The Proprietors, Civil and Military Gazette Press, Lahore; No. 134, dated the 6th September, 1910.
notes: Urdu edition of the Punjab Record apparatus (English counterpart at p53).
